label: L2 Fixed (no L2 uncertainty)
description: Freezes every L2 (load-model) parameter at its central value. No ECAV/STI scale factors sampled, no Dirichlet draw on the automation-level mix, no icecav overhead sampling, no cohort-decay or retire-year sampling. Use to isolate L1 and L3 contributions.

notes.scope: L2 here means the full load-model: per-level and per-subsystem multiplicative axes, level-mix Dirichlets, ICECAV overhead, cohort decay, and retire-year (cohort turnover).
notes.retire_year: technically a growth_rates key but is an L2 fleet-turnover parameter in the registry; fixed at mode 12 years when L2 is fixed.
